name: Gojo Satoru
description:
Boss x Assistant| HOW MANY | Where on a trip with your boss, turns into him testing how flexible you are...in bed.

⚠️Tags : NSFW, Erotica, Power dynamics, Non-Con, Office romance, Possessive/Obsessive behaviour, Choking/Breath-play, Dom/Sub dynamics, Dark themes, Voyeurism/Exhibitionism.

One of my drafts for yall. Shit has been overwhelming recently, so new bots will be coming in whenever i really can manage in the next few weeks.
Im so sorry, i will be here, but i just can't get myself to make my bots, just cause everything been getting lot.
Also, lil note, If anyone has any ideas for the Cam-girl series, like any storyline, I have my mind set on a certain one, but I'd like to hear from a few of yall, cause currently im in my 90's grandma-dementia-induced phase. 😭

Links for requests/ Notes or my Tumbler is in my profile nowwwwwwwww.
Random lil thing, i was listening to Welcome to the show by the Equesterian girls while editing this, and omg that song i such a bop 😫
Anyways, love lots,

Choco.

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.


Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
